tools.name: search_memories
tools.description: Searches semantically across stored memories using Mem0. Use this to retrieve relevant context about user preferences, patterns, and past interactions before responding. This is for retrieval only - use add_memory to store new memories, and list_memories to see all memories.

query.description: Search query text to find relevant memories

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return

user.description: User ID to search memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: add_memory
tools.description: Adds new memories to Mem0 storage. Use this when user explicitly asks to remember something or to store conversation context for future retrieval. Supports two forms: simple text memory or conversation messages (auto-extracts memories via LLM). For searching stored memories, use search_memories instead.

text.description: Simple text memory to store (use instead of messages)

messages.description: Array of conversation messages to extract memories from (use instead of text)

user.description: User ID to store memory for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: Lists all stored memories for a user with IDs and creation dates. Use this to see what memories are currently stored. For searching specific memories, use search_memories instead.

user.description: User ID to list memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Deletes memories from Mem0 storage. Use this to remove specific memories or all memories for a user. Supports two modes: delete a specific memory by ID, or delete all memories for a user.

memory_id.description: ID of specific memory to delete (use instead of all flag)

all.description: Delete all memories for the user (use instead of memory_id)

user.description: User ID to delete memories for (required when using all flag)

messages.content: Hey, I wanted to let you know my preference for Instagram paid promotions - I usually go with carousel ads for my campaigns since they get better engagement for my content. Can you remember that for me so I don't have to keep explaining it every time we talk strategy?

function_call.name: skill-tools-add_memory
function_call.arguments: {"text": "User prefers carousel ads for Instagram paid promotions because they get better engagement for their content. This is their go-to format for campaign strategy."}

messages.content: {"memory": {"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "User prefers carousel ads for Instagram paid promotions because they get better engagement for their content. This is their go-to format for campaign strategy."}}
messages.name: skill-tools-add_memory

messages.content: Got it! I've saved your preference for carousel ads as your go-to format for Instagram paid promotions. I'll keep this in mind next time we discuss campaign strategy.
Hey, can you show me what preferences you've stored so far about social media promotion? I want to make sure everything is there.

messages.name: skill-tools-search_memories

messages.content:
Here's what's currently stored:

1. **Instagram Paid Promotion Preference**: You prefer carousel ads for your campaigns because they get better engagement for your content. This is your go-to format for campaign strategy.

That's the only social media promotion preference in storage right now. Would you like to add any other preferences (e.g., other platforms, ad formats, budget preferences)?

Thanks for showing me that! I can see the carousel ad preference is there. Can you also pull up all my other stored memories so I can verify everything you've saved for me across different topics? I want to make sure nothing's missing.

{"memories": [{"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "User prefers carousel ads for Instagram paid promotions because they get better engagement for their content. This is their go-to format for campaign strategy."}]}
messages.name: skill-tools-list_memories

messages.content:
Here's everything currently stored in your memories:

1. **Instagram Paid Promotion Preference** - You prefer carousel ads for Instagram paid promotions because they get better engagement for your content. This is your go-to format for campaign strategy.

That's the only memory saved so far. It looks like we haven't stored any other preferences or information about you yet. Is there anything else you'd like me to remember for future conversations?

Actually, I've been thinking about it - I've recently shifted my strategy and I'm now using video ads for my Instagram promotions instead of carousels. The carousel preference you stored earlier isn't relevant to my current approach anymore. Can you go ahead and remove that memory for me?

Done! I've removed the carousel ad preference from your stored memories. 

If you'd like, I can save your new strategy preference for video ads instead - just let me know and I'll remember that for future conversations.

structured_turns.assistant_message: Got it! I've saved your preference for carousel ads as your go-to format for Instagram paid promotions. I'll keep this in mind next time we discuss campaign strategy.
